title: Create: Brass Tools
description:
Ever wanted brass tools in create fabric? Here they are!

Coded with Mcreator and Fabric Generator 1.20.1

The textures belong to furti-two and his forge mod "Create Stuff & Additions".

more infos for forti-two in the changelog.
body:
### Ever wanted brass tools in create fabric? Here they are!
You can craft these tools/this armor just like every other vannilla tool/armor

Brass has the same efficiency as diamond, but drops only iron drops

_Coded with Mcreator and Fabric Generator 1.20.1_

Feel free to copy the code!
